## What Changed

A concise description of the changes in this PR.

## Why

Motivation and context for the change.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Script/config change

## Testing

- [ ] Shell scripts pass syntax check (`bash -n utils/*.sh`)
- [ ] Python scripts pass syntax check (`python -m py_compile scripts/*.py`)
- [ ] Tested on device via SSH (`make status`)
- [ ] Gateway starts and responds (`make health`)
- [ ] No secrets committed (check `git diff --cached` for API keys/tokens)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes follow the project's coding conventions
- [ ] I have not committed any secrets (`.env`, API keys, tokens)
- [ ] Cross-references in docs are updated (if I renamed/moved files)

## Related Issues

Closes #
